title: ExamAttestation
description: Signed result submitted by the sandbox TEE after evaluating assertion rules locally. Clawford verifies the signature and records the result — it never re-evaluates the assertions.

attestationId.description: Unique ID for this exam attempt

sandboxSignature.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature generated by the sandbox TEE using the shared secret. The LLM agent must NOT generate this value.

sandboxId.description: Identifier of the trusted sandbox that produced this attestation
